zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注关键支撑争夺
zh.content:
从当前价格表现来看，AVAX/USD运行于6.5361附近，24小时跌幅0.26%，整体仍处于短线弱势震荡格局。价格位于20日简单移动平均线6.55784下方，说明市场短期趋势偏空，买盘力量暂未形成有效反转信号，后续需关注能否重新站稳均线。

技术指标方面，MACD值为-0.0171，处于零轴下方，显示空头动能依然占优。由于RSI指标暂时缺失，市场超买超卖状态难以进一步确认，但结合价格持续受压于均线，短期趋势仍倾向于维持弱势整理，市场情绪相对谨慎。

关键价位方面，短期支撑区域位于6.5270附近，该位置接近当日低点，一旦有效跌破，可能进一步测试6.4500区域。上方第一阻力位位于6.5850附近，若成功突破并站稳，则有望向6.6500至6.7000区间发起反弹挑战。

交易策略上，建议短线投资者以观望或逢高减仓为主，激进交易者可关注6.5270支撑位的反弹机会，但需严格设置止损。若价格重新站上20日均线并伴随成交量放大，可考虑逐步布局短线反弹行情。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche (AVAX/USD) is currently trading at 6.5361, remaining under modest bearish pressure after posting a 24-hour decline of 0.26%. Price action is consolidating near the lower end of the daily range between 6.5271 and 6.5852, indicating a lack of strong directional momentum. The fact that the current price is trading slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 6.55784 suggests that short-term sentiment remains cautious, with sellers maintaining a marginal advantage in the market.

Technical indicators provide a mixed but slightly negative outlook. The MACD value of -0.0171 indicates that bearish momentum remains present, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. Meanwhile, the unavailable RSI reading prevents a complete assessment of overbought or oversold conditions. Nevertheless, the combination of negative MACD territory and price positioning below the SMA(20) implies that the market has yet to establish a convincing bullish reversal pattern.

From a price structure perspective, immediate support appears near the recent low of 6.5271, with additional downside support likely emerging around the psychologically important 6.5000 level. On the upside, resistance is evident near the intraday high of 6.5852, followed by stronger resistance around the SMA(20) region at approximately 6.5600-6.6000. A sustained break above these levels would improve the short-term outlook, while a failure to hold current support could trigger additional selling pressure.

For traders, a cautious approach remains appropriate under current market conditions. Short-term participants may consider waiting for either a confirmed breakout above resistance or a decisive breakdown below support before initiating positions. Risk management remains essential, particularly given the narrow trading range and limited momentum signals. Longer-term investors may prefer to monitor for stabilization above the moving average and confirmation of improving momentum indicators before increasing exposure.
